calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2004 Off Calendar

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-18-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quieting Title-Real Property Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Robert Wishner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Laurence X. Odhner, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: The Testate and Intestate successors of James H. Hartl, deceased, and all Persons Claiming by, through, or under such Decedent.
Judgment is granted and as fully describe in the two page Judgment signed in open court.
See scanned doc. for details.
